verses.latin_vulgate: Congregavit autem rursum David omnes electos ex Israël, triginta millia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֨סֶף ע֥וֹד דָּוִ֛ד אֶת־כׇּל־בָּח֥וּר בְּיִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל שְׁלֹשִׁ֥ים אָֽלֶף׃
verses.douay_rheims: And David again gathered together all the chosen men of Israel, thirty thousand.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja David taas kokosi kaikki valitut miehet Israelista, kolmekymmentä tuhatta,
verses.king_james: Again, David gathered together all the chosen men of Israel, thirty thousand.

verses.latin_vulgate: Surrexitque David, et abiit, et universus populus qui erat cum eo de viris Juda, ut adducerent arcam Dei, super quam invocatum est nomen Domini exercituum, sedentis in cherubim super eam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֣קׇם ׀ וַיֵּ֣לֶךְ דָּוִ֗ד וְכׇל־הָעָם֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר אִתּ֔וֹ מִֽבַּעֲלֵ֖י יְהוּדָ֑ה לְהַעֲל֣וֹת מִשָּׁ֗ם אֵ֚ת אֲר֣וֹן הָאֱלֹהִ֔ים אֲשֶׁר־נִקְרָ֣א שֵׁ֗ם שֵׁ֣ם יְהֹוָ֧ה צְבָא֛וֹת יֹשֵׁ֥ב הַכְּרֻבִ֖ים עָלָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: And David arose and went, with all the people that were with him of the men of Juda to fetch the ark of God, upon which the name of the Lord of Hosts is invoked, who sitteth over it upon the cherubims.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja David nousi ja meni, ja kaikki kansa kuin hänen tykönänsä oli Juudan asuvaisista, tuomaan sieltä Jumalan arkkia, joka kutsutaan Herran Zebaotin nimi, joka asuu Kerubimin päällä.
verses.king_james: And David arose, and went with all the people that were with him from Baale of Judah, to bring up from thence the ark of God, whose name is called by the name of the Lord of hosts that dwelleth between the cherubims.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et imposuerunt arcam Dei super plaustrum novum : tuleruntque eam de domo Abinadab, qui erat in Gabaa : Oza autem et Ahio, filii Abinadab, minabant plaustrum novum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּרְכִּ֜בוּ אֶת־אֲר֤וֹן הָאֱלֹהִים֙ אֶל־עֲגָלָ֣ה חֲדָשָׁ֔ה וַיִּ֨שָּׂאֻ֔הוּ מִבֵּ֥ית אֲבִינָדָ֖ב אֲשֶׁ֣ר בַּגִּבְעָ֑ה וְעֻזָּ֣א וְאַחְי֗וֹ בְּנֵי֙ אֲבִ֣ינָדָ֔ב נֹהֲגִ֖ים אֶת־הָעֲגָלָ֥ה חֲדָשָֽׁה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they laid the ark of God upon a new cart: and took it out of the house of Abinadab, who was in Gabaa, and Oza and Ahio, the sons of Abinadab, drove the new cart.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja he panivat Jumalan arkin uuden vaunun päälle ja toivat sen AbiNadabin huoneesta, joka asui Gibeassa. Mutta Ussa ja Ahjo, AbiNadabin pojat ajoivat sitä uutta vaunua.
verses.king_james: And they set the ark of God upon a new cart, and brought it out of the house of Abinadab that was in Gibeah: and Uzzah and Ahio, the sons of Abinadab, drave the new cart.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque tulissent eam de domo Abinadab, qui erat in Gabaa, custodiens arcam Dei Ahio præcedebat arcam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשָּׂאֻ֗הוּ מִבֵּ֤ית אֲבִֽינָדָב֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר בַּגִּבְעָ֔ה עִ֖ם אֲר֣וֹן הָאֱלֹהִ֑ים וְאַחְי֕וֹ הֹלֵ֖ךְ לִפְנֵ֥י הָאָרֽוֹן׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when they had taken it out of the house of Abinadab, who was in Gabaa, Ahio having care of the ark of God went before the ark.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin he toivat sen AbiNadabin huoneesta, joka oli Gibeassa, Jumalan arkin kanssa; ja Ahjo kävi arkin edellä.
verses.king_james: And they brought it out of the house of Abinadab which was at Gibeah, accompanying the ark of God: and Ahio went before the ark.

verses.latin_vulgate: David autem et omnis Israël ludebant coram Domino in omnibus lignis fabrefactis, et citharis et lyris et tympanis et sistris et cymbalis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְדָוִ֣ד ׀ וְכׇל־בֵּ֣ית יִשְׂרָאֵ֗ל מְשַֽׂחֲקִים֙ לִפְנֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֔ה בְּכֹ֖ל עֲצֵ֣י בְרוֹשִׁ֑ים וּבְכִנֹּר֤וֹת וּבִנְבָלִים֙ וּבְתֻפִּ֔ים וּבִמְנַעַנְעִ֖ים וּֽבְצֶלְצֱלִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: But David and all Israel played before the Lord on all manner of instruments made of wood, on harps and lutes and timbrels and cornets and cymbals.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin David ja kaikki Israelin huone soittivat Herran edessä kaikkinaisilla honkaisilla kanteleilla ja harpuilla, psaltareilla, trumpuilla, kulkuisilla ja simpeleillä.
verses.king_james: And David and all the house of Israel played before the Lord on all manner of instruments made of fir wood, even on harps, and on psalteries, and on timbrels, and on cornets, and on cymbals.

verses.latin_vulgate: Postquam autem venerunt ad aream Nachon, extendit Oza manum ad arcam Dei, et tenuit eam : quoniam calcitrabant boves, et declinaverunt eam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּבֹ֖אוּ עַד־גֹּ֣רֶן נָכ֑וֹן וַיִּשְׁלַ֨ח עֻזָּ֜ה אֶל־אֲר֤וֹן הָֽאֱלֹהִים֙ וַיֹּ֣אחֶז בּ֔וֹ כִּ֥י שָֽׁמְט֖וּ הַבָּקָֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when they came to the floor of Nachon, Oza put forth his hand to the ark of God, and took hold of it: because the oxen kicked and made it lean aside.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kuin he tulivat Nahonin riihen tykö, otti Ussa Jumalan arkin ja piteli sitä, sillä härjät menivät sivuin tietä.
verses.king_james: And when they came to Nachon’s threshingfloor, Uzzah put forth his hand to the ark of God, and took hold of it; for the oxen shook it.

verses.latin_vulgate: Iratusque est indignatione Dominus contra Ozam, et percussit eum super temeritate : qui mortuus est ibi juxta arcam Dei.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּֽחַר־אַ֤ף יְהֹוָה֙ בְּעֻזָּ֔ה וַיַּכֵּ֥הוּ שָׁ֛ם הָאֱלֹהִ֖ים עַל־הַשַּׁ֑ל וַיָּ֣מׇת שָׁ֔ם עִ֖ם אֲר֥וֹן הָאֱלֹהִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the indignation of the Lord was enkindled against Oza, and he struck him for his rashness: and he died there before the ark of God.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin Herran viha julmistui Ussan päälle, ja Jumala löi hänen siinä maahan hänen tyhmyytensä tähden, niin että hän kuoli siinä Jumalan arkin tykönä.
verses.king_james: And the anger of the Lord was kindled against Uzzah; and God smote him there for his error; and there he died by the ark of God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Contristatus est autem David, eo quod percussisset Dominus Ozam, et vocatum est nomen loci illius : Percussio Ozæ, usque in diem hanc.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּ֣חַר לְדָוִ֔ד עַל֩ אֲשֶׁ֨ר פָּרַ֧ץ יְהֹוָ֛ה פֶּ֖רֶץ בְּעֻזָּ֑ה וַיִּקְרָ֞א לַמָּק֤וֹם הַהוּא֙ פֶּ֣רֶץ עֻזָּ֔ה עַ֖ד הַיּ֥וֹם הַזֶּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And David was grieved because the Lord had struck Oza, and the name of that place was called: The striking of Oza, to this day.
verses.finnish_biblia: Silloin tuli David murheelliseksi, että Herra niin repäisi Ussan, ja kutsui sen paikan PeretsUssa, tähän päivään asti.
verses.king_james: And David was displeased, because the Lord had made a breach upon Uzzah: and he called the name of the place Perez–uzzah to this day.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et extimuit David Dominum in die illa, dicens : Quomodo ingredietur ad me arca Domini ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּרָ֥א דָוִ֛ד אֶת־יְהֹוָ֖ה בַּיּ֣וֹם הַה֑וּא וַיֹּ֕אמֶר אֵ֛יךְ יָב֥וֹא אֵלַ֖י אֲר֥וֹן יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And David was afraid of the Lord that day, saying: How shall the ark of the Lord come to me?
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja David pelkäsi Herraa sinä päivänä ja sanoi: kuinka Herran arkki tulisi minun tyköni?
verses.king_james: And David was afraid of the Lord that day, and said, How shall the ark of the Lord come to me?

verses.latin_vulgate: Et noluit divertere ad se arcam Domini in civitatem David : sed divertit eam in domum Obededom Gethæi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלֹא־אָבָ֣ה דָוִ֗ד לְהָסִ֥יר אֵלָ֛יו אֶת־אֲר֥וֹן יְהֹוָ֖ה עַל־עִ֣יר דָּוִ֑ד וַיַּטֵּ֣הוּ דָוִ֔ד בֵּ֥ית עֹבֵֽד־אֱדֹ֖ם הַגִּתִּֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he would not have the ark of the Lord brought in to himself into the city of David: but he caused it to be carried into the house of Obededom the Gethite.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja ei tahtonut antaa tuoda sitä tykönsä Davidin kaupunkiin, vaan salli kannettaa ObedEdomin Gatilaisen huoneesen.
verses.king_james: So David would not remove the ark of the Lord unto him into the city of David: but David carried it aside into the house of Obed–edom the Gittite.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et habitavit arca Domini in domo Obededom Gethæi tribus mensibus : et benedixit Dominus Obededom, et omnem domum ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּ֩שֶׁב֩ אֲר֨וֹן יְהֹוָ֜ה בֵּ֣ית עֹבֵ֥ד אֱדֹ֛ם הַגִּתִּ֖י שְׁלֹשָׁ֣ה חֳדָשִׁ֑ים וַיְבָ֧רֶךְ יְהֹוָ֛ה אֶת־עֹבֵ֥ד אֱדֹ֖ם וְאֶת־כׇּל־בֵּיתֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the ark of the Lord abode in the house of Obededom the Gethite three months: and the Lord blessed Obededom, and all his household.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herran arkki viipyi kolme kuukautta ObedEdomin Gatilaisen huoneessa, ja Herra siunasi hänen ja kaiken hänen huoneensa.
verses.king_james: And the ark of the Lord continued in the house of Obed–edom the Gittite three months: and the Lord blessed Obed–edom, and all his household.

verses.latin_vulgate: Nuntiatumque est regi David quod benedixisset Dominus Obededom, et omnia ejus, propter arcam Dei. Abiit ergo David, et adduxit arcam Dei de domo Obededom in civitatem David cum gaudio : et erant cum David septem chori, et victima vituli.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֻּגַּ֗ד לַמֶּ֣לֶךְ דָּוִד֮ לֵאמֹר֒ בֵּרַ֣ךְ יְהֹוָ֗ה אֶת־בֵּ֨ית עֹבֵ֤ד אֱדֹם֙ וְאֶת־כׇּל־אֲשֶׁר־ל֔וֹ בַּעֲב֖וּר אֲר֣וֹן הָאֱלֹהִ֑ים וַיֵּ֣לֶךְ דָּוִ֗ד וַיַּ֩עַל֩ אֶת־אֲר֨וֹן הָאֱלֹהִ֜ים מִבֵּ֨ית עֹבֵ֥ד אֱדֹ֛ם עִ֥יר דָּוִ֖ד בְּשִׂמְחָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And it was told king David, that the Lord had blessed Obededom, and all that he had, because of the ark of God. So David went, and brought away the ark of God out of the house of Obededom into the city of David with joy. And there were with David seven choirs, and calves for victims.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja se oli sanottu kuningas Davidille, että Herra oli siunannut ObedEdomin huoneen ja kaiken mitä hänellä oli, Jumalan arkin tähden. Niin meni David ja toi Jumalan arkin ObedEdomin huoneesta Davidin kaupunkiin ilolla.
verses.king_james: And it was told king David, saying, The Lord hath blessed the house of Obed–edom, and all that pertaineth unto him, because of the ark of God. So David went and brought up the ark of God from the house of Obed–edom into the city of David with gladness.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque transcendissent qui portabant arcam Domini sex passus, immolabat bovem et arietem,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֗י כִּ֧י צָעֲד֛וּ נֹשְׂאֵ֥י אֲרוֹן־יְהֹוָ֖ה שִׁשָּׁ֣ה צְעָדִ֑ים וַיִּזְבַּ֥ח שׁ֖וֹר וּמְרִֽיא׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when they that carried the ark of the Lord had gone six paces, he sacrificed and ox and a ram:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kuin ne, jotka Herran arkkia kantoivat, olivat käyneet kuusi askelta, niin uhrattiin härkä ja lihava lammas.
verses.king_james: And it was so, that when they that bare the ark of the Lord had gone six paces, he sacrificed oxen and fatlings.

verses.latin_vulgate: et David saltabat totis viribus ante Dominum : porro David erat accinctus ephod lineo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְדָוִ֛ד מְכַרְכֵּ֥ר בְּכׇל־עֹ֖ז לִפְנֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֑ה וְדָוִ֕ד חָג֖וּר אֵפ֥וֹד בָּֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: And David danced with all his might before the Lord: and David was girded with a linen ephod.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja David hyppäsi kaikella voimalla Herran edessä ja hän oli vaatetettu liinaisella päällisvaatteella.
verses.king_james: And David danced before the Lord with all his might; and David was girded with a linen ephod.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et David et omnis domus Israël ducebant arcam testamenti Domini in jubilo, et in clangore buccinæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְדָוִד֙ וְכׇל־בֵּ֣ית יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל מַעֲלִ֖ים אֶת־אֲר֣וֹן יְהֹוָ֑ה בִּתְרוּעָ֖ה וּבְק֥וֹל שׁוֹפָֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And David and all the louse of Israel brought the ark of the covenant of the Lord with joyful shouting, and with sound of trumpet.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja David ja kaikki Israelin kansa toivat Herran arkin riemulla Ja basunan helinällä.
verses.king_james: So David and all the house of Israel brought up the ark of the Lord with shouting, and with the sound of the trumpet.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque intrasset arca Domini in civitatem David, Michol filia Saul, prospiciens per fenestram, vidit regem David subsilientem atque saltantem coram Domino : et despexit eum in corde suo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָיָה֙ אֲר֣וֹן יְהֹוָ֔ה בָּ֖א עִ֣יר דָּוִ֑ד וּמִיכַ֨ל בַּת־שָׁא֜וּל נִשְׁקְפָ֣ה ׀ בְּעַ֣ד הַחַלּ֗וֹן וַתֵּ֨רֶא אֶת־הַמֶּ֤לֶךְ דָּוִד֙ מְפַזֵּ֤ז וּמְכַרְכֵּר֙ לִפְנֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֔ה וַתִּ֥בֶז ל֖וֹ בְּלִבָּֽהּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when the ark of the Lord was come into the city of David, Michol the daughter of Saul, looking out through a window, saw king David leaping and dancing before the Lord: and she despised him in her heart.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kuin Herran arkki joutui Davidin kaupunkiin, katsoi Mikal, Saulin tytär akkunasta ja näki kuningas Davidin hyppäävän kaikella voimallansa Herran edessä, ja hän katsoi hänen ylön sydämessänsä.
verses.king_james: And as the ark of the Lord came into the city of David, Michal Saul’s daughter looked through a window, and saw king David leaping and dancing before the Lord; and she despised him in her heart.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et introduxerunt arcam Domini, et imposuerunt eam in loco suo in medio tabernaculi, quod tetenderat ei David : et obtulit David holocausta et pacifica coram Domino.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּבִ֜אוּ אֶת־אֲר֣וֹן יְהֹוָ֗ה וַיַּצִּ֤גוּ אֹתוֹ֙ בִּמְקוֹמ֔וֹ בְּת֣וֹךְ הָאֹ֔הֶל אֲשֶׁ֥ר נָטָה־ל֖וֹ דָּוִ֑ד וַיַּ֨עַל דָּוִ֥ד עֹל֛וֹת לִפְנֵ֥י יְהֹוָ֖ה וּשְׁלָמִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they brought the ark of the Lord, and set it in its place in the midst of the tabernacle, which David had pitched for it: and David offered holocausts, and peace offerings before the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja he toivat Herran arkin sisälle ja panivat sen siallensa keskelle majaa, jonka David oli sille rakentanut. Ja David uhrasi polttouhria ja kiitosuhria Herran edessä.
verses.king_james: And they brought in the ark of the Lord, and set it in his place, in the midst of the tabernacle that David had pitched for it: and David offered burnt offerings and peace offerings before the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque complesset offerens holocausta et pacifica, benedixit populo in nomine Domini exercituum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְכַ֣ל דָּוִ֔ד מֵהַעֲל֥וֹת הָעוֹלָ֖ה וְהַשְּׁלָמִ֑ים וַיְבָ֣רֶךְ אֶת־הָעָ֔ם בְּשֵׁ֖ם יְהֹוָ֥ה צְבָאֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when he had made an end of offering holocausts and peace offerings, he blessed the people in the name of the Lord of hosts.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kuin David oli uhrannut polttouhria ja kiitosuhria, siunasi hän kansan Herran Zebaotin nimeen,
verses.king_james: And as soon as David had made an end of offering burnt offerings and peace offerings, he blessed the people in the name of the Lord of hosts.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et partitus est universæ multitudini Israël tam viro quam mulieri singulis collyridam panis unam, et assaturam bubulæ carnis unam, et similam frixam oleo : et abiit omnis populus, unusquisque in domum suam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְחַלֵּ֨ק לְכׇל־הָעָ֜ם לְכׇל־הֲמ֣וֹן יִשְׂרָאֵל֮ לְמֵאִ֣ישׁ וְעַד־אִשָּׁה֒ לְאִ֗ישׁ חַלַּ֥ת לֶ֙חֶם֙ אַחַ֔ת וְאֶשְׁפָּ֣ר אֶחָ֔ד וַאֲשִׁישָׁ֖ה אֶחָ֑ת וַיֵּ֥לֶךְ כׇּל־הָעָ֖ם אִ֥ישׁ לְבֵיתֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he distributed to all the multitude of Israel, both men and women, to every one, a cake of bread, and a piece of roasted beef, and fine flour fried with oil: and all the people departed every one to his own house.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja jakoi kaikelle kansalle ja kaikelle Israelin seurakunnalle, miehille ja vaimoille, jokaiselle kyrsän leipää, ja kappaleen lihaa, ja mitan (viinaa); sitte meni kaikki kansa matkaansa, jokainen huoneesensa.
verses.king_james: And he dealt among all the people, even among the whole multitude of Israel, as well to the women as men, to every one a cake of bread, and a good piece of flesh, and a flagon of wine. So all the people departed every one to his house.

verses.latin_vulgate: Reversusque est David ut benediceret domui suæ : et egressa Michol filia Saul in occursum David, ait : Quam gloriosus fuit hodie rex Israël discooperiens se ante ancillas servorum suorum, et nudatus est, quasi si nudetur unus de scurris.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֥שׇׁב דָּוִ֖ד לְבָרֵ֣ךְ אֶת־בֵּית֑וֹ {ס} וַתֵּצֵ֞א מִיכַ֤ל בַּת־שָׁאוּל֙ לִקְרַ֣את דָּוִ֔ד וַתֹּ֗אמֶר מַה־נִּכְבַּ֨ד הַיּ֜וֹם מֶ֣לֶךְ יִשְׂרָאֵ֗ל אֲשֶׁ֨ר נִגְלָ֤ה הַיּוֹם֙ לְעֵינֵי֙ אַמְה֣וֹת עֲבָדָ֔יו כְּהִגָּל֥וֹת נִגְל֖וֹת אַחַ֥ד הָרֵקִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And David returned to bless his own house: and Michol the daughter of Saul coming out to meet David, said: How glorious was the king of Israel to day, uncovering himself before the handmaids of his servants, and was naked, as if one of the buffoons should be naked.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kuin David palasi siunaamaan huonettansa, meni Mikal, Saulin tytär ulos häntä vastaan ja sanoi: kuinka jalo on ollut Israelin kuningas tänäpänä, joka on itsensä paljastanut palveliainsa piikain edessä, niinkuin irstaat ihmiset paljastavat itsensä!
verses.king_james: Then David returned to bless his household. And Michal the daughter of Saul came out to meet David, and said, How glorious was the king of Israel to day, who uncovered himself to day in the eyes of the handmaids of his servants, as one of the vain fellows shamelessly uncovereth himself!

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixitque David ad Michol : Ante Dominum, qui elegit me potius quam patrem tuum et quam omnem domum ejus, et præcepit mihi ut essem dux super populum Domini in Israël,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֣אמֶר דָּוִד֮ אֶל־מִיכַל֒ לִפְנֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֗ה אֲשֶׁ֨ר בָּחַר־בִּ֤י מֵֽאָבִיךְ֙ וּמִכׇּל־בֵּית֔וֹ לְצַוֺּ֨ת אֹתִ֥י נָגִ֛יד עַל־עַ֥ם יְהֹוָ֖ה עַל־יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל וְשִׂחַקְתִּ֖י לִפְנֵ֥י יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And David said to Michol: Before the Lord, who chose me rather than thy father, and than all his house, and commanded me to be ruler over the people of the Lord in Israel,
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta David sanoi Mikalille: Herran edessä joka minun valinnut on pikemmin kuin sinun isäs ja kaiken hänen huoneensa, ja on käskenyt minun olla Herran kansan Israelin päämiehenä: ja Herran edessä minä tahdon iloita.
verses.king_james: And David said unto Michal, It was before the Lord, which chose me before thy father, and before all his house, to appoint me ruler over the people of the Lord, over Israel: therefore will I play before the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: et ludam, et vilior fiam plus quam factus sum : et ero humilis in oculis meis, et cum ancillis de quibus locuta es, gloriosior apparebo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּנְקַלֹּ֤תִי עוֹד֙ מִזֹּ֔את וְהָיִ֥יתִי שָׁפָ֖ל בְּעֵינָ֑י וְעִם־הָֽאֲמָהוֹת֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר אָמַ֔רְתְּ עִמָּ֖ם אִכָּבֵֽדָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: I will both play and make myself meaner than I have done: and I will be little in my own eyes: and with the handmaids of whom thou speakest, I shall appear more glorious.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja minä tahdon vielä halvempi olla ja nöyrä minun silmäini edessä: ja minä kunnioitetaan niiden piikain kanssa, joistas puhunut olet.
verses.king_james: And I will yet be more vile than thus, and will be base in mine own sight: and of the maidservants which thou hast spoken of, of them shall I be had in honour.

verses.latin_vulgate: Igitur Michol filiæ Saul non est natus filius usque in diem mortis suæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּלְמִיכַל֙ בַּת־שָׁא֔וּל לֹא־הָ֥יָה לָ֖הּ יָ֑לֶד עַ֖ד י֥וֹם מוֹתָֽהּ׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: Therefore Michol the daughter of Saul had no child to the day of her death.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Mikalilla, Saulin tyttärellä ei ollut yhtään lasta kuolemapäiväänsä asti.
verses.king_james: Therefore Michal the daughter of Saul had no child unto the day of her death.
